name: Ganesh Kalal
tagline: Project Engineer in Demolition, Remediation and Civil Infrastructure
kicker: Melbourne VIC  Demolition  Remediation  Civil Works
heroTitle: I deliver complex demolition and civil works safely, compliantly and on program.
heroSubtitle: Project Engineer with experience across demolition, refinery closures and major infrastructure projects. Strong in subcontractor coordination, procurement, QA documentation and statutory approvals.
signatureLine: Plan the job. Control the risks. Deliver it right.
aboutLead: A professional overview presented as a personal website rather than a traditional resume.
aboutStory: I am a Melbourne based Project Engineer working across demolition, remediation and civil infrastructure packages. I focus on structured planning, disciplined site control and maintaining clean QA documentation. I work closely with subcontractors, consultants and authorities to deliver safe and compliant outcomes in complex environments.
knownFor: Preparation of SOW and RFQ packages
ITPs, inspections and NCR close out
Cost tracking, reporting and variations support
tools: MS Project, Primavera P6, Procore, Oracle NetSuite

bento.title: How I run a site
bento.preview: Clear sequence, controlled risks and structured execution.
bento.fullText: My approach focuses on early risk identification, clear subcontractor briefings, defined hold points and ongoing documentation. I maintain visibility across safety, cost and program.
bullets: Clear exclusion zones and access planning

bento.title: Safety and compliance
bento.preview: Practical controls and strong documentation for demolition and civil works.
bento.fullText: I support safe delivery through SWMS preparation, permit coordination, inspection hold points and compliance with relevant Australian Standards and authority requirements.

bento.title: QA and documentation
bento.preview: Inspection planning and evidence based close out.
bento.fullText: I maintain structured QA systems including ITPs, inspection records, photo evidence and NCR tracking to ensure clean project handover.

projects.title: ExxonMobil Refinery Closure
projects.preview: Subcontractor management, procurement and statutory approvals for demolition packages.
projects.fullText: Supported planning and execution of refinery demolition works including procurement, subcontractor coordination and authority approvals.
bullets: Reviewed contractor designs and resolved RFIs

projects.title: Rio Tinto Refinery Closure
projects.preview: Large scale industrial closure with remote delivery support.
projects.fullText: Supported structural design reviews, procurement coordination and QA verification on a major refinery closure program.

projects.title: National 5G Upgrade Program
projects.preview: Structural upgrades across multiple telecom sites.
projects.fullText: Delivered structural design coordination and site inspections for telecom tower and pole upgrades across Victoria.

bullets: Planning and delivery of demolition and civil packages
